sections.title: Born This Day
sections.author: Ken Canedo
sections.snippet: The people who wandered in darkness have seen a marvelous light. And on those who lived too long in the shadows, a great light shines.

sections.author: Owen Alstott
sections.snippet: Lord, Every Nation on Earth Will Adore You

sections.author: Sprit & Psalm 2025 - Curtis Stephan
sections.snippet: We Saw His Star at Its Rising and Have Come to Do Him Homage

sections.title: Silent Night
sections.author: STILLE NACHT
sections.snippet: Silent night! Holy night! All is calm, all is bright. Round yon Virgin Mother and child! Holy Infant so tender and mild, Sleep in heavenly peace, Sleep in heavenly peace.

sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: We have seen his star in the East, and have come with gifts to adore the Lord

sections.title: Christ Our Light Has Come
sections.author: Steve Angrisano/Curtis Stephan
sections.snippet: Still, come be still; let us hear the prophets calling. Still, come be still; let us hear the angels sing. For true light has arrived to illumine our lives so often beset by the darkness. We find who we are in the light of the star on the way to our journey’s end.

sections.title: Bread of Angels
sections.author: Curtis Stephan
sections.snippet: Bread of angels, we receive you; with us now abide. Precious Jesus, manna of ages, with us now reside. Panis angélicus fit panis hóminum, Dat panis cáelicus figúris términum.

sections.title: A Light to the Nations
sections.author: Ben Walther
sections.snippet: You built a city on mountain peaks.  Your voice from heaven in thunder speaks  the great commandment, compelling us to a world that needs to know your love.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world. Grant us, grant us peace.
